## Problem

What user or business problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler or different approaches did you consider?

## Notes

Add examples, screenshots, or links if helpful. Do not include secrets or customer data.
